_info: Written by louwok.com/admin. index.html reads this at runtime.

menu.name: Plain Fried Rice
menu.desc: The foundation. Egg, bean sprouts, and green onion cooked hot and fast in a screaming wok.

menu.name: Chicken Fried Rice
menu.desc: All-white chicken, egg, bean sprouts, soy, and green onion. Classic done right.

menu.name: Beef Fried Rice
menu.desc: Sliced beef, wok-fired with egg, bean sprouts, and green onion.

menu.name: Shrimp Fried Rice
menu.desc: Plump shrimp, wok-fired with egg, green onion, and a splash of soy.

menu.name: Crab Rangoon
menu.desc: Crispy wonton cups filled with real crab and cream cheese. Fried to gold. Your choice of a 3pc. or 6pc. Sweet n' Sour sauce compliments this well.

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Plain)
menu.desc: Egg foo young patty on soft white bread with lettuce, tomato, mayo and pickles. A Midwest icon.

menu.name: Pineapple Chicken Fried Rice
menu.desc: Sweet meets savory. Served in a hollowed pineapple for the full experience.

menu.name: Ultimate Fried Rice
menu.desc: Everything in one bowl. Beef, chicken, shrimp, bean sprouts & green onion. The works.

menu.name: Fried Chicken
menu.desc: Crispy, seasoned chicken fried golden brown and served hot and fresh. 4 piece or 8 piece

menu.name: Vess Soda
menu.desc: Your choice of a 20 fl oz bottle of Grape, Strawberry, Root Beer, Cream Soda, Fruit Punch, Pineapple, Peach

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Deluxe)
menu.desc: Beef, Chicken, Shrimp along with base of Egg foo young patty on soft white bread with mayo and pickles

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Vegetable)
menu.desc: Broccoli, carrots, cabbage, green onions, bean sprouts served on soft white bread with pickles

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Chicken, Shrimp or Beef)
menu.desc: Chicken, shrimp or beef along with based of egg foo young patty on soft white bread with mayo and pickles.

menu.name: Mystic Carrot Juice
menu.desc: A bright, refreshing blend of fresh carrots and fruit juices, delivering a naturally sweet burst of goodness in every sip.

seo.title: Lou Wok Rice House
seo.description: Lou Wok Rice House was built for the transplants, the foodies, the people who moved to Phoenix and couldn't find the flavors they grew up with.
seo.keywords: fried rice phoenix, crab rangoon phoenix, st paul sandwich, lou wok fried rice, chicken fried rice, vegetable fried rice, fried chicken wings, egg foo young, phoenix fried rice. phoenix fried chicken wings
